ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', $RecordType.Name = 'Partner Opportunity', Text(StageName) = 'Closed Lost', ISCHANGED(Reason_Lost__c), OR( IF(INCLUDES(Product_Type__c,'Group Insurance'), CASE(Reason_Lost__c, 'Chase Exhausted',1, 'Too Expensive',1, 'International',1, 'Cannot insure',1 ,0) ,1) = 0, IF(INCLUDES(Product_Type__c,'Insurance Audit'), CASE(Reason_Lost__c, 'Does not enforce insurance',1, 'Not a priority',1, 'All workers insured',1 ,0) ,1) = 0, IF(INCLUDES(Product_Type__c,'IR35 Health Check'), CASE(Reason_Lost__c, 'Chase exhausted',1, 'Too expensive',1 ,0) ,1) = 0, IF(INCLUDES(Product_Type__c,'IR35 Tool'), CASE(Reason_Lost__c, 'Chase Exhausted',1, 'Too Expensive',1, 'CEST',1, 'Alternative provider',1, 'Not enough Outside IR35',1 ,0) ,1) = 0, IF(INCLUDES(Product_Type__c,'OPP'), CASE(Reason_Lost__c, 'Chase Exhausted',1, 'Too Expensive',1, 'Enforcing contractor',1, 'Alternative provider',1, 'Not enough Outside IR35',1 ,0) ,1) = 0, IF(INCLUDES(Product_Type__c,'Professional Indemnity'), CASE(Reason_Lost__c, 'Does not enforce insurance',1, 'Does not want to recommend',1, 'No Outside IR35 workers',1, 'Alternative provider',1 ,0) ,1) = 0, IF(INCLUDES(Product_Type__c,'Public Liability Affinity'), CASE(Reason_Lost__c, 'Does not want to recommend',1, 'Cannot insure members',1, 'Alternative provider',1 ,0) ,1) = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV14: Please select the correct Reason Lost for the Partner Type.
